map.name: F_shear_sine_padded
map.construction: F(x,y,z)=(x, y+sin x, z), a genuinely 2D nontrivial (non-polynomial, non-triangular-affine coefficient) global diffeomorphism of R^2 padded by idle z. det DF=1 everywhere. Inverse (x,y-sin x) exists globally: F is bijective, dual fields X0=dx-cos(x)dy, X1=dy are both complete (X0 flow: x(t)=x0+t, y(t)=y0-sin(x0+t)+sin(x0), bounded oscillation, no blowup for any t). Pass-like baseline contrasting A007's thin-incompleteness case: here NO incompleteness occurs at all (F surjective, matches B1 vacuously).

placeholders.star_domain_status: X0,X1 complete; ESS standard on R^3 expected

composition_notes: B001 v0.3 pass-like baseline; genuinely 2D nonlinear coupling (not diagonal/triangular-affine like A004/A005) yet globally complete.
non_claims: No dual-F unitary package (T4 N/A, no dual-F claim needed since this is pass-like)

evidence: global diffeomorphism (F,Finv roundtrip verified); X0 flow bounded over wide t range
